name: Thixotropic builder gel MOUSSE GEL 01 Crystal Glass 50 ml
description: Colorless crystal, dedicated for construction of the skeleton. A thixotropic gel with a mousse-like consistency—ideal for extending and building nails as well as strengthening the natural nail plate. Its “liquid memory” formula significantly speeds up salon workflow, and when properly and carefully applied, filing is minimized. Once cured in a UV/LED lamp, it becomes ultra-strong, hard, and highly resistant to damage, yet remains easy to refine. Suitable for stylists of every skill level. What is thixotropy? A dense, mousse-like consistency with a unique property: it changes viscosity under applied force. As it’s worked onto the nail, the structure becomes slightly thinner. This process is called THIXOTROPY, or “liquid memory.” It facilitates smooth and even application, effortless shaping, and gentle self-leveling.
